document_summary: This exhibit is the official Decision of the Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of China on the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), dated September 4, 2009. A total of 648 achievements won awards: 38 first prizes, 205 second prizes, 392 third prizes, and 13 popularization prizes. Liu Dehuan won the third prize in the Journalism and Communication category for his work 'Age Theory: Social Time in Social Space.' Only 15 awards were given in the Journalism and Communication category (0 first prize, 5 second prizes, 10 third prizes), demonstrating the selectivity of Liu's win.

snippets.text: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaInformation Name: Decision of the Ministry of Education on Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)Information Index: 360A13- 14- 2009- 0306- 1 Generation Date: September 4, 2009Issue Agency: Ministry of Education of the People's Republic of ChinaDocument Issue No.: Jiao She Ke (2009) 5 Information Category: Scientific ResearchesBrief Introduction to Contents: Ministry of Education announced the results of the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences). A total of 648 achievements won the award, including first prize of 38 achievements, second prize of 205 achievements, third prize of 392 achievements, and 13 achievement popularization rewards. Now, we hereby release the list of awards (refer to the appendix for details).

snippets.text: # Decision of the Ministry of Education on the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences)
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: Official title of the Ministry of Education's decision document, establishing this as a government-level award for scientific research.

snippets.text: The evaluation of the Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences), has been completed. According to the Ministry's "Award for Outstanding Achievements in Scientific Research in Higher Education (Humanities and Social Sciences)", a total of 648 achievements have been awarded, including 38 first prizes, 205 second prizes, 392 third prizes and 13 achievement popularization prizes, after evaluation by experts, public announcement and review by the Award Committee. Now the list of winners will be announced (see annex).
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: Details the evaluation process and total statistics: 648 awards after expert evaluation, public announcement, and Award Committee review, showing the rigorous selection process.

snippets.text: The award evaluation work for the Outstanding Achievement Award for Scientific Research of Higher Education Institutions (Humanities and Social Sciences) is an important initiative arranged by the Ministry of Education to commend the outstanding achievements made by workers in humanities and social sciences of national higher education institutions. The purposes of the award are to encourage scientific research personnel to actively explore and dare for innovation under the guide of Marxism and principle of linking theories with practices to promote the innovation in discipline system, academic points of views
snippets.subject: Ministry of Education Award
snippets.reasoning: States that the award is an important initiative by the Ministry of Education to recognize outstanding achievements in humanities and social sciences at national universities.
